title: ACCIDENT AT WORK: TYPES AND PROCEDURE FOR INVESTIGATION
author: Matkarimova Sarbinaz Dauletbaevna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The procedure for investigating and recording industrial accidents is regulated at the legislative level of the Republic of Uzbekistan. Despite this, accidents at work and occupational diseases remain a serious problem and cause significant economic losses. In order to minimize this problem, the relevant authorities must necessarily keep a record of all accidents at work, as well as hold the perpetrators accountable in order to prevent and alert the occurrence of accidents at work in the future.
steps_raw: The procedure for investigating and recording industrial accidents is regulated at the legislative level of the Republic of Uzbekistan. Despite this, accidents at work and occupational diseases remain a serious problem and cause significant economic losses. In order to minimize this problem, the relevant authorities must necessarily keep a record of all accidents at work, as well as hold the perpetrators accountable in order to prevent and alert the occurrence of accidents at work in the future.
keywords: accident at work, victim, employee, employer, occupational disease, degree of loss of professional ability to work, work injury, contract of compulsory insurance of civil liability of the employer.
